intro:
Family-friendly golf party game
Tricky holes and fun obstacles
Local multiplayer action
description:
Step onto the course and enjoy a colorful 3D mini golf adventure packed with creative holes, clever obstacles, and competitive fun for everyone.

Minigolf Family Party delivers fast-paced arcade sports gameplay that is easy to learn and exciting to master. Aim carefully, control your power, and sink the perfect putt as you navigate ramps, moving platforms, narrow bridges, loops, and tricky angles. Every course rewards precision, timing, and smart strategy.

Play solo to sharpen your skills and beat your personal best, or gather friends and family for local multiplayer matches full of laughter and friendly competition. Take turns, challenge each other, and see who can finish with the lowest score.

Explore vibrant themed environments with dynamic obstacles that keep every round fresh and unpredictable. Master bank shots, use the terrain to your advantage, and discover clever shortcuts to gain the edge.

With smooth controls and quick rounds, Minigolf Family Party is perfect for short play sessions, party nights, and weekend tournaments. It is a family-friendly sports experience designed for players of all ages.

Features:
• Fun and accessible 3D mini golf gameplay
• Creative courses filled with exciting obstacles
• Skill-based mechanics with precise shot control
• Local multiplayer party mode
• Colorful environments and smooth performance
• Replayable challenges for endless family fun

Line up your shot, plan your angle, and bring the whole family together for the ultimate mini golf party.
